source_code:
def 'priority_score ('age, 'income, 'flags) {
    'score := 0
    if ('age lt 18) then
        'score := 'score - 5
    else
        if (('income gt 5000) and ('flags gt 0)) then
            'score := 'score + 10
        else
            if (('income gt 3000) or ('flags gt 2)) then
                'score := 'score + 5
            else
                'score := 'score + 1
            fi
        fi
    fi
    if ('score lt 0) then
        return 0
    else
        return 'score
    fi
}

paths.path_condition: ('age gte 18) and (('income lte 5000) or ('flags lte 0)) and (('income gt 3000) or ('flags gt 2))
('age gte 18) and (('income lte 5000) or ('flags lte 0)) and (('income lte 3000) and ('flags lte 2))
